summary: The politician’s loss of sensation indicates severe damage likely precluding substantial natural neural regeneration post-T8 vertebral injury. Key barriers include glial scarring inhibiting cell growth and myelination blocking signal transmission essential for healing processes. \(\blacksquare\)
